summary: Frontend testing of 50+ Apariencia options and Ajustes new sections. All 12 new sections present, all critical data-testids found except theme-rosa (actual ID is theme-rose). /ajustes has Export/Import, Atajos, Plantillas and NO appearance sections.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid is 'theme-rose' but review request specifies 'theme-rosa'. The THEMES object uses id='rose', so testid becomes theme-rose. Minor naming mismatch.

action_items: Minor: data-testid for Rosa theme is 'theme-rose' not 'theme-rosa'. Either rename THEMES key from 'rose' to 'rosa' or update documentation. Not a functional bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 sections in /apariencia verified. 12 new sections (7-12) confirmed present including Efectos de Fondo Avanzados, Tipografía Avanzada, Formularios, Datos y Tablas, Dashboard y Widgets, Accesibilidad. All critical testids found: noise-slider, glass-opacity-slider, glass-border-slider, high-contrast-toggle, reset-all-appearance, preset-crystal, density-compact, page-transition-slide, icon-size-large. /ajustes confirmed: export-settings-btn, import-settings-btn, template-tpl_email, template-tpl_telegram, template-tpl_ntfy all found; no appearance sections present.
tests_passed: H1 'Apariencia' and subtitle '50+ opciones para personalizar cada detalle visual' ✅
theme-rose (Rosa) button MISSING data-testid='theme-rosa' — actual is 'theme-rose' ⚠️
